description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Ecosystem Actors can apply for a Resilience Research Project by submitting a proposal to be processed by the Support Scope. To submit a Resilience Research Proposal, the Ecosystem Actor must make a post on the Sky Forum following the template provided in [A.2.
.1.4.5 - Application Template](6cecf165-923a-4720-91f6-11c434afa641) and comply with all requirements described in the subdocuments herein.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
